name: claude-bengo
description: Japanese law firm plugin marketplace — claude-bengo: court templates, family tree generation (相続関係説明図), document proofreading, lawsuit analysis, deterministic legal calculators (traffic damages / child support / debt recalc / overtime / iryubun / property division / inheritance), e-Gov law search, and HMAC-chained audit logs.

plugins.name: claude-bengo
plugins.description: Japanese law firm plugin for Claude Code — court template filling, family tree generation (相続関係説明図), legal document proofreading, lawsuit analysis, e-Gov law search, and deterministic legal calculators (traffic damages, child support, debt recalc, overtime, iryubun, property division, inheritance). Ships HMAC-chained audit logs for compliance with 個人情報保護法 §25. 日本の法律事務所向け Claude Code プラグイン — 裁判所書式入力・相続関係説明図・訴訟分析・法令検索・決定論的計算（交通事故・養育費・遺留分等）。
